title: Basic JavaScript Function Expressions
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Function Expressions. Focus on implementing Anonymous functions correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Function Expressions
description: Create a function that uses Anonymous functions and Named function expressions together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Function Expressions Project
description: Build a small application that applies Anonymous functions, Named function expressions, Function expressions vs declarations in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Function Expressions
description: The following code has bugs related to Anonymous functions. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Function Expressions
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Anonymous functions and Named function expressions.
